en.text: a primitive root (compare H2673lemma חָעָה ayin, corrected to חָצָה); also as denominative from H2671 properly, to chop into, pierce or sever; hence, to curtail, to distribute (into ranks); to shoot an arrow

senses.gloss_en: a primitive root (compare H2673lemma חָעָה ayin, corrected to חָצָה); also as denominative from H2671 properly, to chop into, pierce or sever; hence, to curtail, to distribute (into ranks); to shoot an arrow
